items.title: Engineering Mathematics Vol. 2 (NP Bali)
items.description: Mint condition textbook, barely used. Clean pages, no highlights or markings. Best for 2nd semester engineering students.

items.title: Casio fx-991EX Scientific Calculator
items.description: Original Casio calculator, has solar panel and dual power. Ideal for calculus, matrices, and linear programming classes. 1 year old.

items.title: Hero Sprint Single-Speed Bicycle
items.description: Red commuter bicycle in excellent running condition. Brake pads recently replaced. Comes with front basket and rear combination lock.

items.title: Ergonomic Mesh Study Chair
items.description: Black adjustable mesh chair. Great lumbar support for those long exam prep nights. High quality wheels, fits under standard hostel desks.

notes.title: Data Structures & Algorithms - Complete Syllabus Notes
notes.subject: Data Structures & Algorithms
notes.description: Comprehensive semester-end exam handwritten notes covering Trees, Graphs, Sorting algorithms, Hash tables, and Big-O Analysis with code snippets.

notes.title: Computer Networks Lecture Notes & PYQs
notes.subject: Computer Networks
notes.description: Summarized lecture slides plus solved previous year question papers. Focuses heavily on TCP/IP stack layers, routing protocols, and subnetting.

notes.title: Physics-I Lab Manual & Graph Plots
notes.subject: Engineering Physics
notes.description: Ready-to-use lab readings, formulas, and pre-drawn Excel graph curves for Pendulum and Newton's Rings experiments. Standard first-year syllabus.

lostFound.title: Black leather wallet
lostFound.description: Contains my driving license and some cash. If found, please claim here! I will buy you coffee.

lostFound.title: Casio Scientific Calculator
lostFound.description: Found on the corner desk after the 2:00 PM Chemistry class. Describe the sticker on the back to verify and claim.

events.title: UniHack 2026: Annual Campus Hackathon
events.description: Assemble your team of 2-4 and join us for 24 hours of hacking, free food, mentor guidance, and prizes worth over ₹50,000! Theme: Campus Solutions.

events.title: Battle of the Bands: Musical Fest
events.description: Come support your local campus bands as they compete for the trophy. Food trucks will be present, guest performance by the STU alumni metal band.

feed.title: Midterm Exam Tips for Data Structures?
feed.content: Does anyone know what topics Professor Miller focuses on for the midterms? Is there a lot of balance trees, or is it mostly stacks and queues? Really stressed about the programming section.

comments.content: Miller always asks at least one full traversal question on BSTs (pre, in, post order) and expects you to write a working function. Don't stress too much about AVL rotation implementation, just know the theory!

feed.title: Hostel 3 Wifi is down AGAIN.
feed.content: Seriously, it is the third time this week the wifi has gone completely dead right at 10 PM. Can admin fix this, or are they turning it off on purpose?

comments.content: Same in Hostel 1. I'm literally tethering my mobile data to download assignments. Total joke.

services.title: 1-on-1 Coding Tutoring (Python/C++/React)
services.description: Struggling with lab assignments or coding concepts? I am a 4th year CSE student. I can tutor you online or in the central library. Focus on building logic.

services.title: Graphic Design & UI Mockup Services
services.description: Need clean logos for your club events, flyers, or app designs? I do high-fidelity Figma designs and modern vector branding. Quick turnaround.

messages.text: Hi Sophia, is the Casio Calculator still available?
Hey! Yes, it is still available. I can meet you in the academic block cafeteria tomorrow at lunch to hand it over.
Awesome! That works perfectly. I will message you when I get there.
